## Outcome

What user-visible problem does this solve?

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] UI or benchmark evidence where applicable

## Trust boundary

Does this change source access, commands, permissions, credentials, network
traffic, patch application, or persistence? Explain.

## Evaluation impact

Describe changes to success rate, test pass rate, tokens, cost, latency, or
human review signals. Write “none” when not applicable.
